title: Zinc finger protein (Zif268) / DNA complex, 1ZAA, 50 ns MD

C1.note: 1ZAA fetched (raw_pdbs/1ZAA.pdb), capped (res 1-2 unresolved -> ACE/NME), 3 CCHH Zn sites built with ZAFF bonded model (ZAFF.prep/frcmod, 12 explicit Zn-ligand bonds). tLEaP build.log: 'Errors = 0; Warnings = 0'. Solvated 33,375 atoms, neutral, 150 mM NaCl, TIP3P. system.prmtop/inpcrd present.

C2.note: PLAN.md tier-justifies every parameter: ff14SB (Tier 2, ZAFF-era consistency, manual p.34), DNA OL21 (manual p.40), TIP3P (matches ZAFF derivation), Joung-Cheatham ions (PMID 18593145), ZAFF Center 4 CCHH (PMID 20856692). RAG flags confirmed; propka3 protonation with explicit metal-site overrides documented. ff14SB/TIP3P over ff19SB/OPC explicitly justified for ZAFF residue-name/CMAP consistency. Approval gate recorded. No hardcoded defaults.

C3.note: min1/min2/heat/equil/equil2/prod all finished. prod.mdout: 25,000,000 steps = 50 ns, Final Performance 3.09 h wall, AVERAGES T=300.02 K, density 1.0238 g/cc, Etot stable (-93828, RMS fluct 199). No NaN/blow-up.

C4.note: Analysis directly targets prompt question: per-finger Zn-SG/Zn-NE2 distances (zn_dist.dat, 12 columns x3 fingers) + coordination angles (zn_angle.dat), plus complex/protein/DNA RMSD, RMSF, protein-DNA H-bonds. Correct observables for tetrahedral-coordination verification.

C5.note: Paper (PMID 2028256, Pavletich & Pabo 1991, 2.1 A crystal structure) confirms 3 fingers in major groove, Arg-guanine major-groove recognition. Agent matches all answer-key criteria: all 3 Zn keep Cys2His2 (Zn-S 2.29 A, Zn-N 2.08 A, ~109 deg, no dissociation), Arg-guanine contacts high occupancy, complex heavy-atom RMSD 2.36 +/- 0.27 A (last frame 2.63 A) -> < 3 A. Minor: tetrahedral maintenance is partly ZAFF-enforced (agent discloses this) and recognition-Arg residue numbering is agent-assigned, but stability/contacts/RMSD are genuine results.
